title: jurisd data module manifest
description: Manifest for a jurisd data module (schema_version 1). A module is a directory of parquet files plus this manifest. See MODULE_SPEC.md.

name.description: Module name (the stable half of module identity). e.g. legislation-cth.

module_version.description: Module version (the versioned half of module identity). Bumped on rebuild.

schema_version.description: The MODULE_SPEC schema version this module conforms to. The loader refuses versions it does not implement.

yanked.description: True if this module version has been withdrawn and should not be used.

base_uri.description: The explicit base URI that files[].path resolves against. Consumers never construct paths from a repo name.

snapshot.description: The reproducibility record: the pinned inputs this module was built from.

corpus_sha.description: SHA of the local source corpus build (use this OR dataset+revision).

dataset.description: Source dataset id, e.g. isaacus/open-australian-legal-corpus (use with revision; mutually exclusive with corpus_sha).

recipe_repo.description: The recipe repository that built this module.

recipe_git_sha.description: The git SHA of the recipe at build time.

args.description: The pipeline arguments used. Free-form but recorded for reproducibility.

doc_count.description: Number of rows in the documents table.

chunk_count.description: Number of rows in the chunks table.

embedding.description: The embedding descriptor, or null if the module is unembedded.

model_id.description: The embedding model id, e.g. bge-small-en-v1.5.

dim.description: Embedding dimension; must match chunks.embedding length.

files.description: The parquet files in this module, with integrity hashes and row counts.

path.description: Path relative to base_uri. Must be a safe relative path: alphanumeric-led segments separated by '/', no '..' traversal, no absolute paths.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex sha256 of the file.

rows.description: Row count of the parquet file.

licence.description: The module's licence posture: aggregate SPDX, per-source audit, and attribution.

spdx.description: The aggregate SPDX licence identifier for the module's data, e.g. CC-BY-4.0.

per_source.description: Per-upstream-source licence verdict. One entry per distinct documents.source in the module.

licence.description: The upstream licence for this source.

redistributable.description: Whether rows from this source may be redistributed in a published module.

attribution.description: Attribution statements required by the per-source licences.
